values.value:
Dear {!Primary_Applicant_Name__c},
Greetings from Runwal Enterprises!!
We would like to inform you that your referral, {Referral_Name}, recently visited our project site. Our team is currently assisting them with the necessary information and guiding them through the available options.
Thank you once again for recommending Runwal Enterprises to your friends and family. Your trust and support mean a lot to us.
We will keep you updated on the progress of your referral.
Warm regards, Runwal Enterprises

Your Referral Visited Our Project 🏡
[Lead Name] has visited our site. Our team is assisting them with all the details.
Your Referral Has Visited Our Project
